description: Payment instrument header table for Oracle Accounts Payable disbursements. Each record represents a payment document or electronic payment issued to a supplier and captures settlement details, bank information, payment status, remittance attributes, supplier references, and reconciliation data used in the procure-to-pay cycle.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for the transaction in the transaction currency.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the internal bank account used to process the payment or receipt.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with bank account.

columns.name: CHECK_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the payment document was issued.

columns.name: CHECK_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the supplier payment document or electronic payment.

columns.name: CHECK_NUMBER
columns.description: Business payment document number assigned to the check or payment instrument.

columns.name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency code in which the transaction is denominated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup code identifying the method used to settle the transaction.

columns.name: PAYMENT_TYPE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether payment type applies to the record.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.description: Address line 1 of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE2
columns.description: Address line 2 of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE3
columns.description: Address line 3 of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: CHECKRUN_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with checkrun.

columns.name: CHECK_FORMAT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related check format record.

columns.name: CHECK_STOCK_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related check stock record.

columns.name: CITY
columns.description: City component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: COUNTRY
columns.description: Country component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup code identifying the current status of the record.

columns.name: VENDOR_NAME
columns.description: Business name of the supplier.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_CODE
columns.description: Business code identifying the supplier site.

columns.name: ZIP
columns.description: Postal code component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence bank account.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control bank account processing.

columns.name: BANK_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence bank.

columns.name: CHECK_VOUCHER_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence check voucher.

columns.name: CLEARED_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing cleared for the transaction.

columns.name: CLEARED_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the payment or receipt cleared the bank.

columns.name: DOC_CATEGORY_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying doc category for the record.

columns.name: DOC_SEQUENCE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the document sequencing definition used to assign the transaction number.

columns.name: DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE
columns.description: Stored value associated with doc sequence.

columns.name: PROVINCE
columns.description: Province or regional component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: RELEASED_AT
columns.description: Date and time when released occurred.

columns.name: RELEASED_BY
columns.description: User or person responsible for released.

columns.name: STATE
columns.description: State or province code component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: STOPPED_AT
columns.description: Date and time when stopped occurred.

columns.name: STOPPED_BY
columns.description: User or person responsible for stopped.

columns.name: VOID_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the payment document was voided.

columns.name: FUTURE_PAY_DUE_DATE
columns.description: Future dated payment due date used for settlement scheduling.

columns.name: TREASURY_PAY_DATE
columns.description: Date on which treasury processing settled the payment.

columns.name: TREASURY_PAY_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence treasury pay nu.

columns.name: USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying ussgl transaction for the record.

columns.name: USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT
columns.description: Context value used to interpret the USSGL transaction code for federal reporting.

columns.name: WITHHOLDING_STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying withholding status lookup for the record.

columns.name: RECONCILIATION_BATCH_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related reconciliation batch record.

columns.name: CLEARED_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing cleared base for the transaction.

columns.name: CLEARED_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value cleared exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: CLEARED_EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with cleared exchange.

columns.name: CLEARED_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control cleared exchange rate processing.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE4
columns.description: Address line 4 of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: COUNTY
columns.description: County or administrative district component of the address.

columns.name: ADDRESS_STYLE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier payment used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier that owns the transaction in a multi-org Oracle EBS environment.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the supplier master record associated with the transaction.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the supplier site associated with the transaction.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Exchange rate used to convert the foreign currency transaction to functional currency.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Date used to derive the foreign currency conversion rate.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Conversion rate type used to derive the exchange rate for the transaction.

columns.name: BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Functional currency amount derived from the entered transaction amount.

columns.name: CHECKRUN_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related checkrun record.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: CLEARED_ERROR_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing cleared error for the transaction.

columns.name: CLEARED_CHARGES_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing cleared charges for the transaction.

columns.name: CLEARED_ERROR_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing cleared error base for the transaction.

columns.name: CLEARED_CHARGES_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing cleared charges base for the transaction.

columns.name: POSITIVE_PAY_STATUS_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying positive pay status for the record.

columns.name: TRANSFER_PRIORITY
columns.description: Priority used to control processing of the record.

columns.name: EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the external supplier or customer bank account used for settlement.

columns.name: STAMP_DUTY_AMT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for stamp duty.

columns.name: STAMP_DUTY_BASE_AMT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for stamp duty base.

columns.name: MRC_CLEARED_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing mrc cleared base for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_CLEARED_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value mrc cleared exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_CLEARED_EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with mrc cleared exchange.

columns.name: MRC_CLEARED_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control mrc cleared exchange rate processing.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value mrc exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with mrc exchange.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control mrc exchange rate processing.

columns.name: MRC_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing mrc base for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_CLEARED_ERROR_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing mrc cleared error base for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_CLEARED_CHARGES_BASE_AMT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for mrc cleared charges base.

columns.name: MRC_STAMP_DUTY_BASE_AMT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for mrc stamp duty base.

columns.name: MATURITY_EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with maturity exchange.

columns.name: MATURITY_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control maturity exchange rate processing.

columns.name: MATURITY_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value maturity exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text business description entered to explain the purpose or content of the transaction.

columns.name: ACTUAL_VALUE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with actual value.

columns.name: ANTICIPATED_VALUE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with anticipated value.

columns.name: RELEASED_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the payment or hold was released.

columns.name: STOPPED_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the payment was stopped.

columns.name: MRC_MATURITY_EXG_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with mrc maturity exg.

columns.name: MRC_MATURITY_EXG_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value mrc maturity exg for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_MATURITY_EXG_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control mrc maturity exg rate processing.

columns.name: IBAN_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence iban nu.

columns.name: CE_BANK_ACCT_USE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related ce bank acct use record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE
columns.description: Payment method used to settle the transaction.

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the Trading Community Architecture party associated with the record.

columns.name: PARTY_SITE_ID
columns.description: Party site associated with the supplier, customer, or payment record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_PROFILE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related payment profile record.

columns.name: SETTLEMENT_PRIORITY
columns.description: Priority used by payment processing to determine the order of settlement.

columns.name: BANK_CHARGE_BEARER
columns.description: Indicates which party bears bank charges associated with the payment or receipt settlement.

columns.name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the legal entity responsible for the transaction.

columns.name: PAYMENT_DOCUMENT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related payment document record.

columns.name: COMPLETED_PMTS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related completed pmts group record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related payment record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_INSTRUCTION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related payment instruction record.

columns.name: VOID_CHECK_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence void check nu.

columns.name: VOID_CHECK_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related void check record.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with remit to supplier.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to supplier record.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE
columns.description: Supplier site to which payment remittance is directed.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to supplier site record.

columns.name: RELATIONSHIP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related relationship record.

columns.name: PAYCARD_AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence paycard authorization nu.

columns.name: PAYCARD_REFERENCE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related paycard reference record.

columns.name: ACKNOWLEDGED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether acknowledged applies to the record.

business_questions: Show supplier payments issued during a date range.
List voided, stopped, or cancelled payment documents.
Find checks that have not yet cleared the bank.
Show payments issued to a specific supplier or supplier site.
Display bank account and payment method details for disbursements.
Find payments created by a specific payment batch or payment run.
Show cleared amount and clearing date for reconciled payments.
Identify high-value supplier payments above a business threshold.
